title: Big Bazaar is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Big Bazaar is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Big Bazaar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Big Bazaar:
Big Bazaar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Big Bazaar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
